name: Dillybeans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans and snip off the ends. Discard any wilted or discolored beans.
2. In a saucepan, combine water, vinegar, pickling salt, sugar, bay leaves, and onions. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add the green beans to the boiling liquid and cook for just 5 minutes until they remain crisp. Remove from heat and drain immediately in cold water.
4. Pack the beans upright into 8-ounce jars with a couple of slices of onion.
5. Add 1 hot pepper, 1 clove garlic, and a sprig of dill to each jar.
6. Pour the hot vinegar mixture over the beans, ensuring it covers them completely.
7. Seal the jars immediately.
NOTE:
Thinly cut carrots or other firm vegetables may be used in place of or in addition to the green beans.
